name: zhihu
description: Zhihu Q&A search, user profiles, topic feeds, trending — page transport with cookie session via L3 adapter

dependencies.searchContent \u2192 getMember: searchContent returns author url_token used by getMember
dependencies.searchContent \u2192 listSimilarQuestion: searchContent returns question IDs used by listSimilarQuestions
dependencies.getMember \u2192 getUserAnswers: getMember returns url_token used by getUserAnswers
dependencies.getMember \u2192 listMemberActivities: getMember returns url_token used by listMemberActivities
dependencies.getMember \u2192 listMemberMutuals: getMember returns url_token used by listMemberMutuals
dependencies.getMember \u2192 followUser: getMember returns url_token used by followUser
dependencies.getMember \u2192 unfollowUser: getMember returns url_token used by unfollowUser
dependencies.searchContent \u2192 upvoteAnswer: searchContent returns answer IDs used by upvoteAnswer
dependencies.searchContent \u2192 cancelUpvote: searchContent returns answer IDs used by cancelUpvote
dependencies.searchContent \u2192 followQuestion: searchContent returns question IDs used by followQuestion
dependencies.searchContent \u2192 unfollowQuestion: searchContent returns question IDs used by unfollowQuestion
